llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Production Manager
job.company: Toray BASF PBT Resin Sdn. Bhd.
job.description: O bjectives of the Position Responsible in managing daily production operations to ensure timely, safe, and high-quality production of products, while also focusing on training production personnel, optimizing procedures, and ensuring compliance. Main Responsibilities Ensure all environmental, health and safety rules and guidelines are fully adhered and maintaining high safety standards for a safe working environment. Plan, organize, and manage daily production activities to ensure that production schedules and target quantities are met. Lead, mentor, and develop a team of Production Superintendent, Production Supervisors, Boardmen and technicians fostering a culture of teamwork and accountability. Conduct periodic training, performance evaluations, provide feedback, and identify training needs for team members (including succession planning for roles Boardman and above). Facilitate effective communication within the production team and across departments. Perform internal audits to support ISO9001, ISO14001 and ISO 50001 standards. Implement and uphold quality control measures to maintain product quality requirements and consistency within production team. Coordinate production trials, test and implement recommendations from Toray to improve plant operation and product quality as and when required (via MOC process). Job Requirements Bachelor’s degree in chemical engineering, Polymer Engineering, Materials Science, or a related field At least 7 years of experience in production management within a manufacturing environment, preferably in polymerization and distillation processes. Technical Professional Knowledge Proven experience leading teams and managing production operations. Strong communication skills, both verbal and written (English Bahasa Malaysia) Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple priorities. A proactive and results-oriented mindset with a focus on continuous improvement. Commitment to fostering a positive and inclusive workplace culture.
